basic_details.job_title: Panjab University Apprentice Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Panjab University Apprentice Trainee in Architecture Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://puchd.ac.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the Panjab University Apprentice Trainee in Architecture Recruitment 2026.

selection_process: Display of Eligible List Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Panjab University Apprentice Trainee in Architecture Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Panjab University Apprentice Trainee in Architecture Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Apprentice Trainee in Architecture Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Panjab University Apprentice Trainee in Architecture recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications is 21 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Apprentice Trainee in Architecture post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for this post is a 3-Year Diploma in Architectural Assistantship. Ensure you meet this criterion before applying.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Apprentice Trainee in Architecture position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a stipend of Rs. 8000 Per Month for the duration of their training period.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Apprentice Trainee in Architecture post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Apprentice Trainee in Architecture position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Apprentice Trainee in Architecture role?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves the display of an eligible candidates list, followed by an interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the duration of the training for the Apprentice Trainee?
faq.answer: The training is scheduled to start on 01 October 2026 and will conclude on 30 September 2027, making it a one-year training program.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Panjab University. Links are provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Panjab University, located in Chandigarh, with the pincode 160014.
